archetype: Archetype 2: Performance Pro / Archetype 4: Swiss High-Contrast hybrid
reasoning: A dark, highly technical 'control room' vibe fits the IT security domain. We use a base of deep tinted navy to accommodate Pantone 541, paired with Pantone 314 (Teal/Cyan) accents. We prioritize stark white text for high contrast. This conveys authority, safety, and ruggedness suited for construction.

rules: NO Inter for headings. Ensure Outfit and IBM Plex Sans are imported via Google Fonts.
Overlines must be uppercase + tiny + tracking-[0.2em].
Line-height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: TETRIS GRID (asymmetric) for Features/Why Us; CONTROL ROOM (dense) for Stats and Approach.

component_guidelines.buttons: Flat solid. Primary CTAs use bg-white text-[#003B71] to avoid overuse of teal. Secondary/Form CTAs use bg-[#0077B3] text-white. Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
component_guidelines.cards: Surface strategy: 'Grid Borders'. 1px subtle borders (border-[#003B71]), dark flat background (#001A33). NO soft shadows.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn inputs with custom styles: bg-black/20, border-[#003B71], text-white, focus:border-[#0077B3].
component_guidelines.accordion: Shadcn accordion for FAQs with border-b border-[#003B71] and clear white hover state.

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay bg-[#020812]/80. Ensure text is clearly visible.

tech_bg.usage: Background overlay for Compliance or Approach section

tablet_manager.usage: Featured image in 'Why Construction Needs Specialized IT'.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.content: Veracity Technologies text logo + Phone (952) 941-7333 + 'Schedule Audit' CTA.

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Headline: 'Stop Job Site Downtime Before It Stops Your Project.' Subhead, CTA 'Schedule Your Free Audit', phone number. Use 'hero_bg'.

sections.name: Intro_Stats
sections.content: Problem statement with data points: 41% rise in construction ransomware, 75% credential exposure alerts. Style as large 'Control Room' metric cards.

sections.name: Why_Specialized_IT
sections.content: Bullets explaining the need for construction-specific IT. Use 'tablet_manager'.

sections.name: Our_Approach
sections.content: Proactive monitoring, MFA, DRP, 24/7 support. Use 'server_room' image.

sections.name: Free_Audit_Offer
sections.content: Short form (company name, role, phone, email) with 'Schedule Your Free Audit' CTA.

sections.name: Risk_Reversal
sections.content: $100 charity donation promise guarantee. Standalone prominent section.

sections.name: Footer
sections.content: Compliance credentials, affiliations (AGC, ABC), Phone, Email.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page landing page strictly using the provided colors and images.
Implement the 'Tetris Grid' pattern for the 'Why Construction Needs IT' section.
For the Problem Statement stats (41% / 75%), use massive typography (text-5xl to text-6xl+) in a Bento box format.
Use Lucide React icons for the IT services and compliance badges.
Ensure the contact form uses Shadcn Form components with proper hover/focus states.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, accordions, toggles).
Use Framer Motion for subtle entry animations on scroll (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1).
